; readmarkable-3.26.0.68.qmd — adds a ReadMarkable tile to chiappa's
; home-screen side drawer, next to AppLoad's tile.
;
; Validated on-device 2026-04-15 (chiappa firmware 3.26.0.68, XOVI v18,
; AppLoad v0.5.0). See docs/specs/2026-04-15-home-tile-design.md.
;
; Implements Q1-relaxed variant (Option B from spec): on-disk .qmd
; cannot REMOVE AppLoad's tile (rules registered on-disk-first apply
; BEFORE AppLoad's runtime-API-registered insert, so our REMOVE would
; no-op). This file INSERTs a sibling tile and leaves AppLoad's tile
; alone. AppLoad's drawer therefore remains usable for any other
; installed XOVI apps.
;
; Structure: mirrors upstream asivery/rm-appload/xovi/template/appload.qmd
; AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]] block, with the id, label, icon path
; and tap-handler body substituted.
;
; Icon: qrc:/ark/icons/my_files (a stock xochitl "My Files" glyph).
; Empirical findings on chiappa fw 3.26.0.68: the tile element type that
; AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]] INSERTs accepts qrc:/* URLs but rejects
; every other URL scheme we tried —
;   - qrc:/readmarkable/icon.png via an injected .rcc: rendered as a black
;     square; qt-resource-rebuilder iterates the exthome dir but does NOT
;     register sibling .rcc files on this build despite the asivery README
;     listing them as supported (only .qmd files are picked up).
;   - file:///<path>: xochitl logged "Could not find <url>" even when the
;     file existed with world-readable permissions.
;   - data:image/png;base64,...: same "Could not find" error. The tile's
;     source-resolver apparently ignores non-qrc schemes entirely.
; Stock xochitl resources work fine, so we borrow one. my_files is a
; reMarkable-styled folder glyph — close enough to "library" that it's
; visually meaningful next to AppLoad's tile. A bespoke ReadMarkable
; icon needs a working qrc:/ injection route (via a patched .qrr or a
; .so-registered runtime resource); deferred until we crack that.
;
; Tap handler: calls AppLoad's own launcher with id "external::readmarkable"
; (external-app id prefix is set in rm-appload library.cpp via
; `externalApplications[QString("external::") + entry->d_name] = app;`).
; Reuses all of AppLoad's launch plumbing (scope escape, env setup,
; manifest-driven spawn) while skipping the drawer UI.

AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.AppLoad [[180922.180921]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[15885405667098360701]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[3819512207256720568]]#[[4073320026945606142]]
        INSERT {
            ~&16385778650434842232&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: openReadMarkable
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "openReadMarkable"
                ~&214642559243&~: ~&6504222003&~("ReadMarkable")
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/ark/icons/my_files"
                ~&7082453764421&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                    AppLoadLauncher.requestLaunch("external::readmarkable", [], {}, false);
                }
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&15061686673205541622&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                ~&11921478716705041271&~: ~&6504254477&~
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[6504254477]]
        REBUILD [[15578034235503008618]]
            LOCATE AFTER STREAM \~&16045040163728568448&~\ INSERT STREAM \, openReadMarkable\
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
